zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Whitney於1225年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也時，他的父親Eustace de Whitney40歲，母親Ann Talbot41歲。他於1240年與Ann Le Gross在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1277年之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whitney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitney in Herefordshire, the etymology of which is uncertain. The second element is Old English ēg ‘island, piece of higher ground in a low-lying area’; the first appears to be hwītan, which is either the genitive singular of an Old English byname Hwīta (meaning ‘white’), or the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of the adjective hwīt ‘white’. The name may also derive from Whitney (now Whitney Wood) in Stevenage (Hertfordshire), probably named from Old English hwītan ‘white’ + (ge)hæge ‘enclosure’.
History: John Whitney came from London, England, to Watertown, MA, in 1635, and had numerous prominent descendents.

variants.name: Witney
meanings: English: habitational name from Witney in Oxfordshire, which for centuries was a centre of the wool trade, famous in particular for the manufacture of blankets. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Witta (genitive Wittan) + Old English ēg, īeg ‘island’. There may have been some confusion with Whitney .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Whitney was born in 1225, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Eustace de Whitney, was 40 and his mother, Ann Talbot, was 41. He married Ann Le Gross in 1240, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1277, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Whitney est né en 1225, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eustace de Whitney, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ann Talbot, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Ann Le Gross en 1240, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1277, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Whitney 1225 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace de Whitney 40 und seine Mutter Ann Talbot 41. Er hat 1240 in England, United Kingdom Ann Le Gross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1277 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Whitney è nato il nel 1225 nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eustace de Whitney, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ann Talbot, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Ann Le Gross nel 1240, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1277, nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Whitney(이)가 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace de Whitney(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Talbot(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ann Le Gross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.
